title: Navy 10+2 (B.Tech) Cadet Entry January 2027, Check Details, Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the

vacancy_details.eligibility: 12th with PCM (70% Marks), Appeared in JEEMAIN 2026, Only Unmarried Candidates are Eligible
